text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team — your help keeping things running smoothly is appreciated. Jump into #welcome and say hi!
Hey guide_sam, welcome aboard! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to seeing you at community events. Say hi in #welcome when you're ready!
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience and willingness to help others is exactly what this community needs. Drop by #welcome and introduce yourself!
